category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts Android sparse images to raw images and back; official README documents Android sparse image conversion commands.
docs_sources: No dedicated docs site found; official GitHub README contains build and usage examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/anestisb/android-simg2img; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official README describe Android sparse/raw image conversion tools.
